class.name: locomotion_ros2_gait_lab_sil/GaitLabSilJointForwardController
class.description: Queued forwarder from gait_lab policy joint targets into ros2_control position commands.

class.name: locomotion_ros2_gait_lab_sil/GaitLabSilRlResidualController
class.description: Embedded gait_lab RL residual inference from observation + CPG feedforward topics.
